content: Self-Refine's framework of iterative unsupervised output polishing can be re-framed as a "bootstrapped aggregation of multiple self-reflection perspectives", where each iteration of self-feedback draws a new inconsistent problem-solving perspective from the LLM itself to refine outputs, rather than relying on pre-defined multiple perspectives. This turns single-path iterative refinement into a dynamic multi-perspective reflection system that retains Self-Refine's core advantage of requiring no extra training or supervision.
